description: Global skill catalog index - used by skill-router for routing decisions

schema.negative_samples: Scenarios where this skill should NOT be used
schema.dependencies: Other skills this depends on (chain calls)

skills.name: superpowers-brainstorming
skills.description: [dev][Superpowers] Design discussion - USE when new feature/requirements unclear. DO clarify via Q&A, produce design doc, get user approval before coding. NOT for known requirements. Triggers: help me design/think about/plan
skills.triggers: New feature/project/requirements not yet clear; need to think before coding
skills.negative_samples: Clear design doc exists; simple bug fix; pure technical question

skills.name: superpowers-tdd
skills.description: [dev][Superpowers] TDD - USE before writing code/fixing bugs/refactoring. DO RED-GREEN-REFACTOR: write test, watch fail, minimal code, pass, refactor. NOT for prototypes/configs. Triggers: write test/first test/tdd
skills.triggers: Before writing new feature code; before fixing bugs; before refactoring
skills.negative_samples: User explicitly says no tests needed; one-off prototype; config changes; docs

skills.name: superpowers-debugging
skills.description: [dev][Superpowers] Systematic debugging - USE when code errors/test failures/unexpected behavior. DO 4-phase RCA: reproduce, isolate, locate, fix+verify. NOT for known errors you can fix directly. Triggers: bug/error/debug/why is this failing
skills.triggers: Code errors/exceptions/unexpected behavior; test failure unknown cause
skills.negative_samples: Simple syntax errors known cause; cases needing no deep analysis

skills.name: superpowers-verify
skills.description: [dev][Superpowers] Pre-completion verification - USE before claiming done/merging PR/committing. DO run verification, confirm tests pass, check output. NOT for discussion/design phase. Triggers: verify/check/confirm done
skills.triggers: Before claiming task complete/fixed/before merging PR
skills.negative_samples: Still in discussion/design phase; not yet implementing

skills.name: superpowers-writing-plans
skills.description: [dev][Superpowers] Write implementation plans - USE after design approved/complex tasks. DO break into 2-5min tasks with file paths, code, verification. NOT for trivial tasks. Triggers: make a plan/break this down/implementation plan
skills.triggers: Design doc approved needs implementation; complex task needs decomposition
skills.negative_samples: Very simple one-step tasks; user already has plan; direct coding only

skills.name: superpowers-review
skills.description: [dev][Superpowers] Code review - USE after code done/before merging PR. DO review against plan, report by severity. NOT for code still in development. Triggers: review/code review/review this
skills.triggers: After code implementation; before merging PR; needs code quality assessment
skills.negative_samples: Code not yet written; still in development; user explicitly no review

skills.name: security-guidance
skills.description: [dev] Security review - USE when auditing code security/finding vulnerabilities. DO 3-layer: pattern warnings, LLM diff review, agentic commit review. NOT for regular code review. Triggers: security/security check/vulnerability/audit
skills.triggers: Need security audit/check code for vulnerabilities
skills.negative_samples: Regular code review no security needs

skills.name: code-simplifier
skills.description: [dev] Code simplification - USE when code needs refactoring/readability improvement. DO keep functionality, improve clarity. NOT for feature changes. Triggers: simplify/refactor/make this cleaner
skills.triggers: Code needs refactoring/simplification/readability improvement

skills.name: ralph-loop
skills.description: [dev] Ralph iteration loop - USE when rapid iteration/experimental development. DO auto-feedback loop until truly done. NOT for clear plan no iteration needed. Triggers: iterate/make it better/refine/not quite right
skills.triggers: Need rapid iteration/experimental development/frequent polishing

skills.name: ponytail
skills.description: [dev] Ponytail code refinement - USE before writing check for over-engineering. DO 5-level ladder: YAGNI, stdlib, native, deps, one-liner. NOT for safety/error handling. Triggers: simplify/reduce code/YAGNI/too much code
skills.triggers: Check for over-engineering before writing code; code too large

skills.name: grill-me
skills.description: [dev] Grill-Me requirements cross-examination - USE when requirements unclear/before making decisions. DO AI relentlessly questions your plan. NOT for clear requirements simple execution. Triggers: grill me/question my plan/cross-examine/challenge me
skills.triggers: Need to clarify requirements/make design decisions/plan unclear
skills.negative_samples: Already have clear plan just need execution

skills.name: diagnosing-bugs
skills.description: [dev] Systematic diagnosis - USE when complex bugs/intermittent issues/performance regression. DO 5-step: reproduce, minimize, hypothesize, probe, fix+test. NOT for simple syntax errors. Triggers: diagnose/bug hunt/root cause/why is this happening
skills.triggers: Complex bugs/performance regression/hard to reproduce

skills.name: domain-modeling
skills.description: [dev] Domain modeling - USE when project terminology unclear/AI-user language mismatch. DO build shared glossary, challenge term consistency. NOT for implementation tasks. Triggers: terminology/domain model/glossary/shared language
skills.triggers: Project terminology unclear; AI and user use different terms

skills.name: improve-codebase-architecture
skills.description: [dev] Architecture improvement - USE when codebase messy/needs architecture review. DO scan, generate HTML report, improve item by item. NOT for single file refactoring. Triggers: architecture review/code quality/design review/refactor architecture
skills.triggers: Codebase becoming messy; need architecture optimization; prevent code rot

skills.name: scrapling-agent-skill
skills.description: [data] Scrapling web scraping - USE when need to scrape web data/web_fetch fails/anti-bot bypass. DO use Scrapling MCP get/fetch/stealthy_fetch. NOT for simple API calls. Triggers: scrape/crawl/extract data/web scraping/bypass cloudflare
skills.triggers: Need to scrape/collect data from websites; web_fetch fails/blocked
skills.negative_samples: Simple API calls; static file download

skills.name: excel-table-processor
skills.description: [data] Excel table processing - USE when processing student attendance/Excel tables. DO preserve format, normalize names, sort by pinyin, renumber. NOT for simple CSV. Triggers: excel/table/spreadsheet/student data/attendance
skills.triggers: Processing student attendance/return Excel tables; need format preservation
skills.negative_samples: Simple CSV without formatting; non-Excel format

skills.name: guizang-ppt-skill
skills.description: [ppt] Guizang web PPT - USE when need HTML PPT/slides/presentation. DO generate horizontal swipe HTML, magazine or Swiss style. NOT for PPTX files. Triggers: make a PPT/presentation/slides/web PPT/horizontal deck
skills.triggers: Need PPT/presentation/presentation slides; user says make PPT
skills.negative_samples: Need PPTX format; simple markdown slides; no design needed

skills.name: ppt-master
skills.description: [ppt] PPT Master - USE when need editable PPTX files/charts. DO pptxgenjs precise control. NOT for web PPT. Triggers: PPTX/editable PPT/charts/data presentation
skills.triggers: Need editable PPTX; PPT with charts/data visualization; PowerPoint-editable
skills.negative_samples: Web PPT version; simple PPT no precision control

skills.name: visual-style-ppt-skill
skills.description: [ppt] Visual style PPT - USE when need design-driven PPT/brand consistency. DO extract design DNA from references. NOT for quick content-first PPTs. Triggers: branded PPT/design style/visual theme/consistent look
skills.triggers: Need design-oriented PPT/brand visual consistency; reference images available
skills.negative_samples: Clear style no reference needed; quick content-only

skills.name: premium-visual-guide
skills.description: [ppt] Premium visual guide - USE when need high-end/professional looking PPT. DO color system, typography, whitespace, background design, image quality. NOT for quick drafts. Triggers: make it look premium/high-end/professional/elegant
skills.triggers: Need premium/high-end visual quality; sophisticated design

skills.name: ppt-motion
skills.description: [ppt] PPT transitions & animations - USE when need smooth transitions/slide animations. DO control slide transitions, entry animations, background micro-motion. NOT for simple static PPTs. Triggers: animation/transition/smooth/morph/motion
skills.triggers: Require slide transition animations/dynamic effects/smooth page turns

skills.name: ppt-dynamic-layout
skills.description: [ppt] Dynamic text-image layout - USE when need parallelogram/diamond/gradient text/mirror effects. DO advanced layout techniques. NOT for simple text layouts. Triggers: dynamic layout/creative layout/parallelogram/diamond
skills.triggers: Need design-oriented layout/parallelogram split/diamond creative/gradient text
skills.negative_samples: Simple text layout no design needed

skills.name: ppt-creative-animation
skills.description: [ppt] Creative animation effects - USE when need opening animations/product showcases/text reveals. DO rotating wreath, film reel, 3D, text reveal, cutout cover. NOT for simple slides. Triggers: opening animation/creative effect/product showcase/text reveal
skills.triggers: Need opening animation/product showcase/text reveal/animated title

skills.name: ppt-transitions
skills.description: [ppt] Slide transitions - USE when need morph/zoom/parallax/carousel effects. DO Morph transitions, Zoom navigation, parallax effects. NOT for simple page flips. Triggers: morph transition/zoom/carousel/parallax/smooth page turn
skills.triggers: Need smooth slide transitions/morph effects/zoom navigation

skills.name: ppt-data-visualization
skills.description: [ppt] Data visualization - USE when need charts/KPI display/data storytelling. DO creative bars, donut charts, beautified charts, SmartArt. NOT for text-only pages. Triggers: chart/data/KPI/visualize/stats/infographic
skills.triggers: Need to display data/charts/KPI/data visualization

skills.name: ppt-douyin-style
skills.description: [ppt] Douyin knowledge-account style - USE when need short-video style/high impact presentation. DO deep background, high contrast, bold fonts, fast-paced animations. NOT for formal business PPTs. Triggers: douyin style/short video/high impact/viral presentation
skills.triggers: Need short-video style/high impact/dynamic presentation

skills.name: ppt-image-processing
skills.description: [ppt] Image & shape processing - USE when need boolean operations/image fill shapes/circular layout. DO shape merge, image fill, radial layout, transparency. NOT for text editing. Triggers: image processing/shape operations/boolean/photo edit
skills.triggers: Need boolean operations/image fill shape/circular layout/photo editing

skills.name: ppt-workflow
skills.description: [ppt] PPT comprehensive workflow - USE when starting a new PPT project. DO follow standard pipeline: content, design, animation, export. NOT for specific single-task. Triggers: new PPT/make a presentation/start from scratch
skills.triggers: Start a new PPT project; need complete workflow guidance
skills.negative_samples: Specific single task within existing PPT

skills.name: frontend-design
skills.description: [design] Frontend design - USE when need UI/UX design/page layout/component design. DO design system driven, consistent UI. NOT for backend logic. Triggers: UI design/frontend/page layout/component/interface
skills.triggers: Need frontend UI/UX design/page layout/component design
skills.negative_samples: Backend logic development; no UI needed

skills.name: skill-router
skills.description: [system] Skill router - USE when multiple skills match/unsure which to use. DO analyze request, query catalog, recall, rerank, execute. NOT for already known single skill. Triggers: which skill/router/not sure what to use
skills.triggers: Multiple skills may match; unsure which skill; complex cross-skill request
skills.negative_samples: Already know which skill to use

skills.name: skill-onboarder
skills.description: [system] Skill on boarding - USE when installing new skill/importing skill. DO fetch, analyze, install_skill, update catalog. NOT for modifying existing skills. Triggers: install skill/new skill/import/onboard
skills.triggers: User says install new skill/import skill/add to ecosystem
skills.negative_samples: Just modifying existing skill; no installation needed

skills.name: skillspector-wrapper
skills.description: [system] SkillSpector security scan - USE before installing new skill/checking skill safety. DO scan for 64 vulnerability patterns. NOT for regular use. Triggers: scan skill/security check/is this safe
skills.triggers: Before installing new skill; check skill security
skills.negative_samples: Regular use no security check needed

skills.name: skillopt-wrapper
skills.description: [system] SkillOpt skill optimization - USE when need to auto-improve skill quality. DO trajectory-driven edits, validation-gated updates. NOT for writing new skills. Triggers: optimize skill/improve skill/skill quality
skills.triggers: Need auto-optimize skill text quality; improve existing skills

skills.name: powertoys-skill
skills.description: [tools] PowerToys Windows utilities - USE when need color picker/batch rename/window layout/image resize. DO reference PowerToys tools. NOT for non-Windows tasks. Triggers: color picker/rename files/window layout/screenshot
skills.triggers: Need Windows enhancement features/color picker/batch rename/window layout

skills.name: handoff
skills.description: [tools] Session handoff - USE when switching AI/sessions need to pass context. DO compact conversation into handoff doc. NOT for single session no handoff. Triggers: handoff/switch AI/continue elsewhere/next person
skills.triggers: Need to switch AI/switch sessions/pass context to another AI
skills.negative_samples: Single session task no handoff needed

skills.name: cua-skill
skills.description: [tools] CUA computer control - USE when need AI to control desktop/mouse/keyboard/screenshots. DO background desktop control macOS/Windows/Linux. NOT for web scraping. Triggers: desktop/click/type/screenshot/control computer
skills.triggers: Need AI to control computer desktop/automate software/mouse keyboard

skills.name: pixelle-video-skill
skills.description: [tools] Pixelle-Video generation - USE when need auto video generation/digital human/image-to-video. DO AI auto short video engine. NOT for PPT creation. Triggers: make video/generate video/short video/digital human
skills.triggers: Need auto-generate short video/video content/digital human

skills.name: agent-reach-skill
skills.description: [tools] Agent-Reach data collection - USE when need data from Twitter/Bilibili/Xiaohongshu/Reddit/LinkedIn. DO one-command install, zero-API-fee collection. NOT for web scraping. Triggers: search twitter/check bilibili/look up xiaohongshu/social media data
skills.triggers: Need collect from Twitter/Bilibili/Xiaohongshu/Reddit/LinkedIn etc

skills.name: system-prompt-leaks-skill
skills.description: [reference] System prompt reference - USE when need to study AI system prompt design/reverse engineer prompts. DO reference collected leaks from Anthropic/OpenAI/Google/xAI. NOT for normal use. Triggers: system prompt/prompt design/how does X prompt work
skills.triggers: Need to understand AI system prompt design/prompt engineering patterns

skills.name: writing-great-skills
skills.description: [reference] Writing great skills guide - USE when writing/improving/optimizing skills. DO follow best practices: predictable, composable, bounded. NOT for skill installation. Triggers: write skill/create skill/how to make a skill/skill best practices
skills.triggers: Need to write/create/improve/optimize skills

skills.name: skeptical-cognition
skills.description: [reference] Skeptical cognition 6 principles - USE when need to evaluate info credibility. DO 6-step: what content, complete, source, evidence, alternatives, need. NOT for simple queries. Triggers: is this true/fact check/verify info/can I trust this
skills.triggers: Need to assess info credibility/judge source reliability

skills.name: humanize-skill
skills.description: [reference] AI text humanization - USE when need to detect/reduce AI traces in text. DO humanize(9 levers) + ai-check(forensic scoring). NOT for non-English text limited effect. Triggers: humanize/ai detection/ai score/rewrite naturally
skills.triggers: Need to detect AI text traces/reduce AI-ness/before paper submission

skills.name: ml-intern-skill
skills.description: [research] ML Intern autonomous research - USE when need to read papers/train ML models/do experiments. DO auto research, code, train, deploy via HF ecosystem. NOT for non-ML research. Triggers: read paper/train model/ML experiment/deploy model
skills.triggers: Need to read papers/train ML models/do ML experiments

skills.name: matlab-research
skills.description: [research] MATLAB research computing - USE when need MATLAB programming/research plotting/signal processing. DO leverage MATLAB R2025b official toolkit 20 categories. NOT for Python tasks. Triggers: MATLAB/matlab plotting/signal processing/math computation
skills.triggers: Need MATLAB programming/research plotting/numerical computation

skills.name: research-writing
skills.description: [research] Literature review & writing - USE when need literature search/review writing/citation management. DO literature retrieval, grouping, IMRaD writing, BibTeX. NOT for math modeling papers. Triggers: literature review/search papers/write review/citation/references
skills.triggers: Need literature search/write review/organize citations/write paper

skills.name: devils-advocate
skills.description: [research] Devils Advocate - USE when need to stress-test research ideas/arguments. DO AI plays devil's advocate with concession-threshold protocol. NOT for simple fact checking. Triggers: challenge me/devils advocate/stress test/my idea/critique
skills.triggers: Need to test research ideas/rigor of arguments/pre-paper stress test

skills.name: research-pipeline
skills.description: [research] Research pipeline workflow - USE when starting complete research project. DO 10-stage orchestrator with integrity gates. NOT for writing-only tasks. Triggers: research project/research workflow/full pipeline/from scratch paper
skills.triggers: Start a complete research project; need full process management

skills.name: math-modeling
skills.description: [competition] Math modeling competition - USE when participating in math competition/need modeling/prediction. DO model selection, code templates, paper writing. NOT for daily data analysis. Triggers: math modeling/competition/model building/regression/optimization
skills.triggers: Participating in math modeling competition; need to build models

skills.name: github-publish-flow
skills.description: [system] GitHub publish workflow - USE when need push skill updates/create repo/modify repo files. DO local commit, push to GitHub. NOT for read-only operations. Triggers: push to github/update repo/publish/release/upload
skills.triggers: Need to push skill updates/create new repo/modify repo files
